name: pet-shop-demo-monorepo
description: Unified repository for 3 Pet Shop Demos and 1 Central Admin Panel using Supabase

scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:shop-one" "npm run start:shop-two" "npm run start:shop-three"
scripts.install:all: concurrently "cd admin-panel && npm install" "cd pet-shope-one && npm install" "cd pet-shop-two && npm install" "cd pet-shop-three && npm install"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "cd admin-panel && npm run build" "cd pet-shope-one && npm run build" "cd pet-shop-two && npm run build" "cd pet-shop-three && npm run build"
